summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OIDC Provider feature and UI fixes. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: badge hidden, OIDC Apps page with logo upload + home_url + integration credentials display, App Launcher shows both SAML and OIDC apps, SAML apps still work correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: The + button to add redirect URI requires precise clicking. User must click the + button after entering URI - pressing Enter in the input field doesn't add it to the list.
ui_bugs.selector: button with + icon next to redirect URI input

passed_tests: Badge: 'Made with Emergent' badge is hidden (display:none via CSS)
OIDC CRUD: Create OIDC app with name, redirect_uri, home_url - returns client_id, client_secret, endpoints
OIDC CRUD: List OIDC apps returns all apps for org
OIDC CRUD: Get OIDC app with include_secret=true returns client_secret
OIDC CRUD: Update OIDC app updates name and home_url
OIDC CRUD: Delete OIDC app removes app from database
OIDC Discovery: GET /api/apps/oidc/{app_id}/.well-known/openid-configuration returns valid OIDC config
OIDC OAuth2 Flow: GET /api/oidc/{app_id}/authorize with token returns 302 with code parameter
OIDC OAuth2 Flow: GET /api/oidc/{app_id}/authorize without token redirects to login
OIDC Token Exchange: POST /api/oidc/{app_id}/token returns access_token and id_token
OIDC UserInfo: GET /api/oidc/userinfo with Bearer token returns user email and name
OIDC Token Exchange: Invalid code returns proper error (invalid_grant)
OIDC Token Exchange: Invalid client_secret returns proper error (invalid_client)
Logo Upload: POST /api/upload/logo returns URL with /api/uploads/ prefix
App Launcher: GET /api/launcher/apps returns both SAML and OIDC apps
Regression: Admin login works correctly
Regression: GET /api/auth/me returns user info with organization
Frontend: Admin sidebar shows all sections (Dashboard, App Launcher, SAML Apps, OIDC Apps, Users, Groups, Roles, Policies, Access Requests, Audit Logs, Settings)
Frontend: OIDC Apps page shows app card with Integration Credentials (Client ID, Auth URL, Token URL, UserInfo URL, Discovery URL)
Frontend: App Launcher shows 6 apps (5 SAML + 1 OIDC)
Frontend: SAML Apps page shows all 5 SAML apps with logos
critical_code_review_comments: OIDC Provider flow is fully implemented: authorize, token, userinfo endpoints work correctly
OIDC Discovery endpoint returns all required OpenID Connect configuration fields
Badge hiding CSS uses multiple techniques (display:none, visibility:hidden, position:absolute) for robustness
OIDC app card displays all integration credentials with copy buttons
App Launcher correctly handles both SAML and OIDC app types
seed_data_creation: Created test OIDC app 'Canteen App' via API for UI verification, then deleted after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: OIDC Provider feature fully tested and working. All OIDC endpoints (authorize, token, userinfo, discovery) work correctly. Frontend OIDC Apps page displays integration credentials. App Launcher shows both SAML and OIDC apps. Badge is hidden via CSS. Minor UX note: redirect URI + button requires explicit click to add URI to list.
